meaning: adj.每两周的,每两星期一次的,隔周发行的n.隔周出版物adv.隔周,每两星期一次地
examples: Meetings take place at fortnightly intervals.
In November, it will start fortnightly publication, and in January it goes weekly.
Health Wonk Review is a fortnightly collection of health policy writing from around the blogosphere.
The team has adopted the toughest of anti-doping regimes, including fortnightly tests for all its riders.
